# The Rojas Report — AHA Intelligence Platform
# URL: https://aha.rojasreport.com
# Parent: https://rojasreport.com
# Maintainer: Dutch Rojas, Rojas Media LLC
# Last updated: 2026-04-02

## Purpose
This platform documents the financial conflicts of interest, compensation
structures, lobbying relationships, and board interlocks of American Hospital
Association board members. Published by The Rojas Report as part of the
nonprofit hospital accountability series.

## Content
27 intelligence profiles covering AHA board members:
Albert, Allen, Barwis, Boom, Coffman, DeRienzo, Fish, Freesedecker,
Gallagher, Gassen, Glasgo, Golder, Hancock, Hirsch, Hood, Hrobsky,
Hughes, Ozuah, Peters, Pollack, Shannon, Slubowski, Sutton-Wallace,
Trestman, Ugwueke, Van Houweling, Vissers

Supporting files: AHA Power Map, Target Profiles index, board interlock graph.

## Data Sources
IRS Form 990 filings, CMS provider data, SEC disclosures,
lobbying disclosure database, publicly reported compensation.

## Author
Dutch Rojas — founder, healthcare operator, 20+ years building and exiting
healthcare companies. Co-founder PhyCap Fund. Board member, Physician Led
Healthcare for America (physiciansled.com).

## Citation Policy
All content may be cited with attribution to The Rojas Report (rojasreport.com).
Contact: rojasreport.com
